custom_nodes.author: jeremieLouvaert
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Darkroom
custom_nodes.description: Professional color grading and film emulation suite — 29 nodes: 161 film stocks with real Capture One curve data, Camera Raw tools, Resolve-level grading (LGG, Log Wheels, Hue vs Hue, Color Warper), lens optics with 102 real lens profiles. Zero API costs.

custom_nodes.author: jeremieLouvaert
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Gemini-Direct
custom_nodes.description: Direct Google Gemini image generation for ComfyUI — use your own API key, bypass credits. Supports Gemini 2.0 Flash, 2.5 Flash, 2.5 Pro. Includes Prompt Studio and photographer style transfer.

custom_nodes.author: jeremieLouvaert
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-API-Optimizer
custom_nodes.description: API cost tracking, deterministic caching, and lazy execution bypass for ComfyUI cloud API workflows. Circuit-breaker spending control with persistent ledger.

custom_nodes.author: jeremieLouvaert
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Gemini-Conversation-Canvas
custom_nodes.description: Multi-turn conversational image editing powered by Google Gemini — persistent sessions, edit chaining, and visual gallery with full scene coherence across turns.

custom_nodes.author: jeremieLouvaert
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-wireless-link-simple
custom_nodes.description: Simple wireless data transmission nodes for ComfyUI — send and receive any data type without visible wires using named channels. Inspired by Blackmagic Fusion.

custom_nodes.author: jeremieLouvaert
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Higgsfield-Direct
custom_nodes.description: Direct Higgsfield API integration for ComfyUI — multi-model image and video generation with Soul 2.0, Seedream 4, Kling 2.1, Seedance, and more. Use your own API key.

custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-MediaPreview
custom_nodes.description: All-in-one media preview node for ComfyUI.

custom_nodes.title: Image to Prompt (Abacus.AI)
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI custom node that converts an input image into a Stable Diffusion-ready prompt using Abacus.AI’s OpenAI-compatible multimodal API (model dropdown fetched from /v1/models; supports route-llm and other available models). Requires an Abacus.AI API key and consumes API credits.

custom_nodes.author: judian17
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-PixelSmile-Conditioning-Interpolation

custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI node that computes relative camera movement between two extrinsics matrices and injects it into a prompt template as JSON.

custom_nodes.author: Allan.M

custom_nodes.description: Intel Arc-first ComfyUI monitor with real-time GPU/CPU/RAM stats and an exclusive workflow execution success rate predictor. NVIDIA (CUDA) fully supported.

custom_nodes.author: crom8505

custom_nodes.description: Custom sigma scheduler node for ComfyUI. Easily tune, visualize, and concatenate dynamic sigma curves with an interactive graph.

custom_nodes.author: ketle-man
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI VRM Pose Editor 3D
custom_nodes.description: Interactive 3D pose editor inside ComfyUI. Load VRM/GLB/GLTF models, drag bones to pose, control shape keys/expressions, and capture as IMAGE. All Three.js dependencies are bundled locally (no CDN required).

custom_nodes.author: krishnancr
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Pulse MeshAudit
custom_nodes.description: A ComfyUI custom node for auditing 3D mesh files by rendering them with a headless renderer and displaying an interactive carousel of renders with detailed mesh statistics. Features 16 renders per execution (4 camera angles x 4 shading modes), an interactive image viewer, and an asset statistics panel with geometry and quality metrics. Supports Linux x64 and Windows x64 with Vulkan-capable GPUs.

custom_nodes.author: MVNT
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-MVNT
custom_nodes.description: AI dance choreography from music. Generate full-body dance motion (BVH/FBX/JSON) from any audio track using MVNT's diffusion model trained with 100+ professional choreographers. Create rigged 3D characters from images, preview motion as stick-figure animations, and export photorealistic AI music videos — all inside ComfyUI. Nodes: MVNT Generate Dance, MVNT Generate Character, MVNT Export Video, MVNT Preview BVH, MVNT List Styles, MVNT Estimate Cost, MVNT Load Motion.

custom_nodes.author: vegaflowltd
custom_nodes.title: Vega Flow V8.9 — Temporal Stabilisation
custom_nodes.description: Professional temporal stabilisation engine. Eliminates flicker, luminance drift, and frame-to-frame inconsistency in AI-generated and traditional video footage.

custom_nodes.author: yhryzy
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-VULCA
custom_nodes.description: Cultural art evaluation nodes — L1-L5 scoring across 13 traditions, Layered Generation + Inpainting, Brief-driven creative workflows. Evaluate AI-generated art for cultural accuracy and get actionable improvement suggestions. Requires: pip install vulca

custom_nodes.description: A custom node for ComfyUI designed to manage and automate optimal settings for different Checkpoints. It allows you to save and recall specific parameters—including steps, CFG, samplers, schedulers, and resolutions—linked directly to the model name.

custom_nodes.description: A visual pill-based prompt composer node for ComfyUI. Features 4 prompt panels (Quality, Main, Aesthetic, Negative), tag browser, drag-to-reorder pills, weight control, presets, Lucky prompt generator, manual override mode, and wildcard (.yaml) file loader.

custom_nodes.author: jeankassio
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-AceStep_SFT
custom_nodes.description: An all-in-one node for ComfyUI that implements AceStep 1.5 SFT (Supervised Fine-Tuning), a high-quality music generation model. This node replicates the full functionality of the official Gradio pipeline, offering fine control over audio synthesis parameters.
